Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels warm when I stand near it... Likely[n]because warm water is running through it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels cool when I stand near it... Likely[n]because cold water is running through it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's not turned on because it's a[n]comfortable temperature this season.[n]{f 1 1}
